item.title: Initial commit
item.description: After installing an jupyternotebook, a mastodon instance and a small server for monitoring the webcam that is delivering a live feed of my stove for checking progress on the pasta cooking process it became evident that a website would also be needed. The mail reason for creation of this site has been the talk at 38c3.

item.title: New Website
item.description: This is the first page of my new website

item.title: About
item.description: About Me 👋 Hello! Im Paul Wetzel, an electrical engeneering student and aspiring software developer with a passion for digital health. From time to time I might also be involved in organising events surrounding sustainability. I live in Berlin, were I attend university and work as a software engeenier. When I find the muse for writing, you might also find some blog articles on this website, but I wouldn’t count on that happening to soon.
